programmes.show_description: Oscar-winning boxing drama film starring Sylvester Stallone and Talia Shire, 1976. A small-time boxer gets a chance at glory when he is challenged by a heavyweight champion.
Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Oscar-winning boxing drama film starring Sylvester Stallone and Talia Shire, 1976. A small-time boxer gets a chance at glory when he is challenged by a heavyweight champion.
Special: American drama following the survivors of a plane crash. Violence ensues and a mysterious island beast reappears when Michael and Locke clash over Walt's upbringing.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Shopping from home.
Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season that includes highlights of Watford vs Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United vs Norwich City at St James' Park.
Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season including West Ham United vs Southampton, Manchester United vs Ipswich Town, and Portsmouth vs Oxford United.
Way of the Stalking Horse: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is shot and left for dead by a hitman who hired him to investigate a bogus missing persons case.
Where Do You Go When You Have No Place to Go?: Classic US detective drama. A Native American is mistaken for a burglar by a company president and ends up accidentally killing him.
Cover Up: Classic drama. A neighbour of Ken asks him to investigate a sudden change in character in her son, and Harry attempts to learn Norwegian for some incoming visitors.
Hearts and Minds: Tough 1970s police drama series. Regan and Carter become involved in a plot to stop a foreign head of state gaining access to a pill that can fight heart disease.
Robots Activate!: US robot combat series. Hardened veterans return to the BattleBox to relive their glory years, and new Giant Nut contenders are determined to make a splash.
Find Me A Rainbow: Classic US action drama series. When a rich woman hires Thomas to find a limo driver who allegedly stole jewellery from her, he uncovers a more unusual theft.
Dead Again: Classic US detective drama. Theo dismisses the story of a woman claiming that a supposedly dead criminal is still alive and intends to kill her to cover his tracks.
The Barefaced Contessa: Classic drama. Harry and Ken's company is providing security for a charity auction in Derbyshire when an old flame of Ken's turns up and asks for his help.
Latin Lady: Tough 1970s police drama series. A rich gynaecologist is attacked by a gang of villains who rob him of his suitcase but is puzzlingly uncooperative afterwards.
Sharpe's Enemy: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Captain Sharpe is assigned the task of delivering a ransom to a horde of deserters who have taken two Englishwomen hostage.
The 2026 World Superbike Championship continues with the Pirelli Portuguese Round as the 4.592km track at the Autodromo Internacional do Algarve pushes the riders to their limits.
Comedy legend Lee Mack hosts the ultimate leveller of a game show - 100 contestants will start, but who will make it to the end to try to win up to 100,000 pounds?
Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Ricochet, Chris Jericho, Kris Statlander, Darby Allin and Claudio Castagnoli.
American Killers: Jeremy Wade travels to one of the largest dams in the Americas on the trail of a river monster that is responsible for the mysterious disappearance of corpses.
Kings of the Canvas: Richard Henwood takes a look back at the glory days of British wrestling with some classic action from the archives.
Croatia take on Brazil as part of the Road to 26 series of international friendlies leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup, from the Camping World Stadium in Orlando Florida.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
From Nijinsky to Tiger Roll, Ed Chamberlin introduces some of the great racehorses of the modern era - enjoy Best Mate's third Gold Cup and Shergar racing to Derby glory.
Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season including Chelsea vs Manchester United, Blackburn Rovers vs Huddersfield Town, and Nottingham Forest vs Aston Villa.
Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season including FA Cup highlights of Hereford United vs Arsenal, Fulham vs Sheffield Wednesday, and Liverpool vs Aston Villa.
Find Me A Rainbow: Classic US action drama series. When a rich woman hires Thomas to find a limo driver who allegedly stole jewellery from her, he uncovers a more unusual theft.
Dead Again: Classic US detective drama. Theo dismisses the story of a woman claiming that a supposedly dead criminal is still alive and intends to kill her to cover his tracks.
The Barefaced Contessa: Classic drama. Harry and Ken's company is providing security for a charity auction in Derbyshire when an old flame of Ken's turns up and asks for his help.
Latin Lady: Tough 1970s police drama series. A rich gynaecologist is attacked by a gang of villains who rob him of his suitcase but is puzzlingly uncooperative afterwards.
Ducks, Dragons, Killer Snakes - What a Zoo!: US robot combat series. Fan favourites Witch Doctor and Duck! face off, and veteran Lock-Jaw tries to avoid Copperhead's spinning drum.
Who Is Don Luis Higgins... and Why Is He Doing These Terrible Things To Me?: Thomas is hired to guard the president of a small South American country.
The Godson: Theo discovers that his teenage godson has turned to crime and tries to set him straight, but a gangster hopes to recruit the boy for a heist.
Lie of the Land: Classic drama. When Ken is called in by a landowner to guard his pheasants, he finds a girl in a copse and something more valuable than game birds enters the scene.
Victims: Tough 1970s police drama series. Carter discovers that an informant was involved in the shooting of a colleague, and Regan finds himself distracted by DCI Haskins' wife.
The Long Ride Back to Scratchwood: Comedy-drama series. Arthur scores an own goal when he is persuaded to buy 2,000 tickets for an England v Scotland football match at Wembley.
Action from the 12th round of fixtures of the 2025-26 Gallagher PREM Rugby season featuring Gloucester v Leicester, Saracens v Northampton, and Bristol v Harlequins.
Henry Cole and his partners Allen Millyard and Guy Willison visit top collector Stuart Imber before preparing to sell their latest finds at the Fairford Steam and Classic Car Show.
Bond film starring Roger Moore and Carole Bouquet, 1981. 007 searches for a vital communication device that gives its bearer unlimited control over Britain's nuclear submarines.
